introSection: Wild Mouse was a B. A. Schiff & Associates steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Funway in Knoxville, Tennessee, USA. It operated from 1966 to 1969 or later.
fullText: Wild Mouse was a B. A. Schiff & Associates steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Funway in Knoxville, Tennessee, USA. It operated from 1966 to 1969 or later.
